estimation_model.calibration_formula: if bucket has >=3 trusted samples, calibrated=round(raw*0.8 + bucket_recommended*0.2); otherwise use raw estimate
estimation_model.confidence_rule: high when bucket has >=10 samples, medium when 3-9, low when <3
